meta.title: Synaplan — AI Platform | All Models. One Platform.
meta.description: Synaplan is the open-source AI platform for companies. Self-hosted, GDPR-compliant, multi-model routing (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama). Embed a chat widget on any website in minutes.
meta.homeTitle: Synaplan — AI Platform | Open-Source · GDPR-Compliant · Self-Hosted
meta.homeDescription: The open-source AI platform for companies and developers. Connect OpenAI, Claude, Groq & local models. GDPR-compliant, self-hosted via Docker. Add an AI chatbot to your website in minutes.

common.ctaTryChatTeaser: Rather chat first? You can try the AI here without signing in.

tryChat.metaDescription: Send a few messages to Synaplan’s AI on our website before opening the full app. Limited demo; continue on web.synaplan.com when you are ready.
tryChat.title: Talk to Synaplan before you sign in
tryChat.subtitle: A short, no-login preview powered by the same API as the web app — so you can feel the product before the login screen.
tryChat.feature2Sub: Same stack as the web app
tryChat.quickPrompt1: In one sentence: what is RAG in Synaplan?
tryChat.quickPrompt2: How does multi-model routing work here?
tryChat.quickPrompt3: What should I know about security and GDPR?
tryChat.bottomCard1Body: Hosting in Europe with clear data separation. Your data stays yours — not the model’s.
tryChat.bottomCard2Body: Use GPT, Claude, local models, and more. Synaplan routes by cost, latency, and your policies.
tryChat.bottomCard3Body: Vector search and semantic retrieval wired in so your knowledge actually shows up in answers.
tryChat.messagesLeft: {count, plural, =0 {No messages left} one {# message left} other {# messages left}}
tryChat.messagesUsage: {sent} of {max} demo messages in this browser
tryChat.welcome: Hi — I’m Synaplan’s assistant. Ask about multi-model routing, RAG on your documents, or the chat widget. Your full workspace is on web.synaplan.com.
tryChat.limitWelcome: You have already used the free demo messages from this browser. Continue in the Synaplan web app for unlimited conversations.
tryChat.notConfigured: The live demo is not configured on this deployment yet. You can still explore the product on web.synaplan.com.
tryChat.limitBody: Continue on web.synaplan.com with your account — unlimited chats and your full workspace.
tryChat.unavailableTitle: We can’t reach the demo right now
tryChat.unavailableBody: Open the full Synaplan app at web.synaplan.com to chat with the same models and your workspace.
tryChat.placeholderLimit: Demo limit reached — continue on web.synaplan.com
tryChat.limitInline: Demo limit reached — continue on web.synaplan.com.
tryChat.unavailableInline: The demo isn’t responding right now. Try again in a moment or open web.synaplan.com.
tryChat.disclaimer: Up to 10 messages per browser in this preview.
tryChat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
tryChat.previewSectionP1: You are talking to the same Synaplan backend as the web app — in a lightweight browser session with a message limit, so you can sample tone and capabilities before signing in.
tryChat.previewSectionP2: This is not a full workspace: no document uploads, website widget, or team audit trail here. Those ship in the hosted app and in our open-source deployment options.
tryChat.step1Body: Type freely or use a suggestion chip. The assistant can explain multi-model routing, RAG, GDPR-oriented hosting, and how teams deploy Synaplan.
tryChat.step2Body: Replies arrive token by token — similar to the in-app chat — so you see latency and quality in real time.
tryChat.step3Body: When the demo limit is reached, open web.synaplan.com for unlimited chats, your workspace, and integrations.
tryChat.exploreSectionLead: These pages go deeper than a short conversation can cover — aligned with how we structure the product story on synaplan.com.
tryChat.exploreCard1Body: Visitor support grounded in crawled pages, PDFs, FAQs, and APIs — same routing and policies as your internal workspace.
tryChat.exploreCard2Body: Durable, controllable context so answers stay consistent across sessions, channels, and use cases.
tryChat.exploreCard3Body: API references, deployment paths, and integration guides for developers and operators.
tryChat.trustSectionBody: Synaplan is 100% open source. Read the code, contribute, or self-host — you stay in control.
tryChat.trustStatsAria: Live figures from the Synaplan repository on GitHub
tryChat.fullscreenDemoBody: This control is not available in the browser demo. Create a free account on web.synaplan.com for the full workspace.
tryChat.fsModesSubline: Preview only — full controls on web.synaplan.com
tryChat.fsModesWebOnlyHint: Full modes and voice in the web app

chatPreview.title: Synaplan AI
chatPreview.bot0: Hi! I'm your Synaplan assistant. I help teams run multi-model routing, RAG on their own documents, and full audit trails — all in one open-source platform you can inspect and self-host.
chatPreview.user0: Can we use GPT and Claude in the same workspace without juggling five different dashboards?
chatPreview.bot1: Yes. Route prompts to OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Mistral, and more from a single API and UI. Switch models per request or per workflow — no vendor lock-in, and you keep one cost and usage view.
chatPreview.user1: What about our own PDFs, contracts, and GDPR — especially if we're in the EU?
chatPreview.bot2: Upload documents for RAG with clear retention rules, keep data in the EU, and use detailed logs for compliance. When you need maximum control, deploy Synaplan on your own infrastructure.
chatPreview.user2: We're also looking at the website widget — how fast can we go live?
chatPreview.bot3: Many teams embed the chat widget in a day: add the snippet or WordPress plugin, style it to your brand, and route traffic through the same policies and models as your internal apps.
chatPreview.user3: Last question: how do we try it without a huge commitment?
chatPreview.bot4: Start with the free tier to explore models and flows, then scale when you're ready. Book a demo anytime if you want a guided walkthrough for your security and procurement checklist.
chatPreview.ctaTryChat: Try the AI chat · no login needed

widgetFlow.title: How the chat widget routes answers
widgetFlow.subtitle: Link visitor questions to crawl targets or your own data. Drag questions onto sources to try mappings, or onto another question to reorder — the preview is for illustration only.
widgetFlow.panelHint: Drag a question or the dots at the ends of a line onto a source to connect. Drag onto another question to reorder. If a source is already used, mappings swap.
widgetFlow.proBanner: With Pro you can connect CRM, ERP, or your own API for personalized answers next to crawled pages.

memoriesSection.title: Memory that stays structured — and actually gets used
memoriesSection.subtitle: Capture preferences, tone, and facts as categorized memories. The neural view shows how they connect to your categories so the model can draft replies, automate email, and sound like you.
memoriesSection.bullet1: Answer recurring email faster with context that remembers your tone, signatures, and policies — without pasting the same instructions every time.
memoriesSection.bullet2: Ground automation in what you approved: memories stay grouped by category, so routing and RAG stay explainable for teams and compliance.
memoriesSection.bullet3: The more you curate, the better the model knows you — preferences and personal context inform assistants across chat, inbox, and workflows.
memoriesSection.demoChatSectionLead: You open the web app — you describe tone and context in your own words. Each save adds a memory; the neural map grows category by category beside the conversation.
memoriesSection.demoChatGreeting: Hi! Tell me how you’d like replies to sound, or anything personal I should remember.
memoriesSection.demoChatUser1: I’d like my replies warm and friendly — short and clear, please.
memoriesSection.demoChatUser2: Please answer me in English by default.
memoriesSection.demoChatUser3: Keep it conversational — not too stiff.
memoriesSection.demoChatUser4: I’m usually free mornings CET; email reaches me best.
memoriesSection.demoChatUser5: Please use a short professional signature in outgoing emails.
memoriesSection.demoChatUser6: I’m based in Berlin if that helps with time zones.
memoriesSection.demoChatFooter: Demo plays automatically — messages stay visible.
memoriesSection.demoChatFooterDone: Demo complete — both sample memories are in the preview above.
memoriesSection.demoChatFooterDoneSideBySide: Demo complete — both sample memories appear in the neural preview beside this chat.
memoriesSection.previewChatUserPref: I'd like replies in a warm, friendly tone — short and clear.
memoriesSection.previewChatUserPersonal: I'm usually available mornings CET — email works best for me.
memoriesSection.previewChatAiSaved: Got it — I'll save that to your Memories.
memoriesSection.previewChatAiSavedPersonal: Thanks — I’ll remember that context for scheduling and outreach.
memoriesSection.canvasHint: Drag any bubble — they collide and springs keep memories linked to their category. Use the legend to focus one group.
memoriesSection.memDetailTone: Used for tone and phrasing in drafts.
memoriesSection.memDetailFormality: How formal or casual answers should sound.
memoriesSection.memDetailHours: Used when scheduling and availability matter.
memoriesSection.memDetailCity: Location context for travel and time zone hints.
memoriesSection.memDetailFamily: First names only — helps friendly, accurate salutations.
memoriesSection.memDetailDiet: Dietary preferences for events and catering suggestions.
memoriesSection.catHintPref: Preference memories anchor style, tone, and policies.
memoriesSection.catHintPersonal: Personal memories cover scheduling, signatures, and context.
memoriesSection.ctaLead: We are expanding guides for memory governance, inbox automation, and team workflows — start here and bookmark the hub.
memoriesSection.metaTitle: Synaplan Memories — neural view, categories, and smarter automation
memoriesSection.metaDescription: Organize memories by category, explore the neural view, and use structured context for email automation and assistants that know your preferences.
memoriesSection.pageLead: Synaplan lets you keep long-lived context in structured memories instead of one-off prompts. The neural view is a visual map: large nodes are categories, smaller nodes are memories you can curate — ideal for explainable automation and consistent tone.
memoriesSection.pageSection1Title: What you can expect next on this hub
memoriesSection.pageSection1Body: Deep dives on memory hygiene (what to store, what to avoid), inbox playbooks, and how memories combine with RAG and the chat widget. Use “Learn more” on the homepage to land here anytime.

pricingPage.metaDescription: Three ways to use Synaplan: open-source self-hosting (free), managed SaaS platform from €19.95/month, or enterprise on-premise deployment with custom pricing.
pricingPage.heroSubtitle: Self-host for free, use our managed platform, or have Synaplan deployed on your own infrastructure.
pricingPage.pathOpenSourceDesc: Download from GitHub and run on your own servers. Full control, all features, Apache 2.0 licensed.
pricingPage.pathOpenSourceF3: Local AI via Ollama (no API costs)
pricingPage.pathPlatformDesc: Always up-to-date, no infrastructure to manage. Access via web.synaplan.com — ready in seconds.
pricingPage.pathEnterpriseDesc: We install and configure Synaplan on your own infrastructure, adapted to your architecture — including custom plugins and integrations.
pricingPage.platformSectionSub: All plans give you access to web.synaplan.com — pick the tier that fits your team size and usage.
pricingPage.includedLead: Core capabilities you should not have to pay extra for as “add-ons”.
pricingPage.included1: Multi-model routing — switch models without juggling separate vendor dashboards
pricingPage.included2: RAG on your documents — semantic search wired into answers
pricingPage.included3: Website chat widget — embed visitor support with the same policies as your workspace
pricingPage.included4: GDPR-oriented options — retention, hosting choices, and clear data separation
pricingPage.included5: Audit-friendly logging — trace what the model used when stakeholders ask
pricingPage.included6: Open source core — inspect the code and self-host when your security team requires it
pricingPage.faq1A: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade when your team size or workload changes — billing details are handled in your account.
pricingPage.faq2Q: Are taxes included in the price?
pricingPage.faq2A: Prices on this page are shown without VAT or local sales tax. The checkout or invoice step applies the correct rate for your country and business status.
pricingPage.faq3A: You can explore Synaplan on our free tier to validate workflows before committing to a paid plan. For teams with procurement or security reviews, book a demo and we’ll walk through your checklist.
pricingPage.faq4A: For high-volume or regulated environments we offer enterprise-style agreements: custom SLAs, dedicated onboarding, and capacity planning. Contact us and we’ll shape something that fits.
pricingPage.faq5Q: How is the Enterprise pricing determined?
pricingPage.faq5A: Pricing is based on infrastructure, desired integrations, and support requirements. Get in touch — we will prepare a tailored quote for you.
pricingPage.pageFootnote: Prices shown are indicative for new subscriptions and may change. Feature availability can vary as the product evolves — the in-app billing page is authoritative.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Synaplan — from setup to GDPR compliance.

items.a: Synaplan is an open-source AI platform built on PHP 8.3+. It lets you connect multiple AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Gemini, Ollama), embed a chat widget on any website, search your documents with RAG (retrieval-augmented generation), and extend functionality with business-specific plugins — all in one self-hosted platform.

Yes. Unlike ChatGPT, Synaplan runs on your own infrastructure, supports multiple AI models simultaneously, is fully open source, and keeps all data within your control. You are not dependent on a single provider and can switch models at any time.

Absolutely. Synaplan can be self-hosted entirely within Germany or the EU — your data never leaves your servers. With local models via Ollama, no external API calls are made at all. This makes Synaplan one of the few AI platforms that can be operated in full GDPR compliance.

items.q: How do I add the chat widget to my website?
items.a: You embed a small JavaScript snippet into your website — just like a Google Analytics or live chat script. The widget connects to your Synaplan instance, uses your custom knowledge base (uploaded documents, FAQs, etc.), and can be styled to match your brand. Setup takes less than 10 minutes.

items.q: Which AI models does Synaplan support?
items.a: Synaplan supports OpenAI (GPT-4o, GPT-4.1), Anthropic (Claude), Google Gemini, Groq (ultra-fast inference), and Ollama for local self-hosted models. You can assign different models to different use cases or let the platform route automatically.

Yes — that is one of Synaplan's core strengths. A single `docker compose up -d` is all it takes. The standard setup (~9 GB) includes local AI via Ollama; the minimal setup (~5 GB) works with cloud APIs only (Groq, OpenAI). Runs on any standard Linux server.

Plugins are company-specific AI extensions that connect Synaplan to your existing business processes. Examples include SortX (AI-powered file management), marketing automation, and document workflows. You can use existing plugins or commission a custom plugin tailored to your company.

items.q: Which industries and company sizes is Synaplan suited for?
items.a: Synaplan is used by SMBs and enterprises across industries including hospitality, trades & crafts, healthcare, and technology. Website operators use the chat widget for customer service, while larger organizations use the full platform for internal knowledge management, document processing, WhatsApp integration, and email automation.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your AI?

hub.metaTitle: Synaplan chat widget — website AI with RAG & GDPR
hub.metaDescription: Embed Synaplan’s chat widget on your site: crawled pages, PDFs, FAQs, and APIs as knowledge. Trades, hotels, and real customer stories. EU-ready.
hub.heroTitle: Your website, your AI — grounded in your content
hub.heroLead: The Synaplan chat widget answers visitors with the same models and policies you use internally. Point it at crawled pages, uploaded documents, structured lists, or connected systems — so answers stay accurate and on-brand.
hub.sectionEmbedP1: Add a small script snippet or the WordPress plugin, match colors and placement to your layout, and publish. No separate bot stack — the widget uses your Synaplan workspace, including routing and cost controls.
hub.sectionEmbedP2: Visitors get instant help on opening hours, pricing, downloads, and contact options while your team stays focused on complex cases.
hub.sectionKnowledgeP1: Combine public crawl targets (e.g. /hours, /pricing) with private sources: PDF handbooks, Word quotes, FAQ bullets, and Pro connectors to CRM or your own API for personalized answers.
hub.sectionKnowledgeP2: You decide what each question type may read — similar to the interactive flow on our homepage: map visitor intents to the right source, swap when content changes.
hub.sectionComplianceP1: Host in the EU, define retention for uploads, and rely on audit-friendly logs when you need to explain what the model saw. Self-host Synaplan when your security team requires full data sovereignty.
hub.sectionExploreLead: Industry-specific playbooks — how trades businesses, hotels, and service teams roll out the widget without drowning in tickets.
hub.cardTradesDesc: Appointments, emergency lines, and spare-part questions — answered from your real pages and PDFs.
hub.cardHospitalityDesc: Front-desk load off: arrivals, parking, breakfast, and local tips from your curated content.
hub.cardCustomersDesc: Yoga studios, care services, public-sector cloud, and more — how organizations deploy Synaplan today.
hub.faq1Q: Does the widget use the same models as our internal Synaplan workspace?
hub.faq1A: Yes. You choose routing and models in one place; the widget is another channel on top of the same policies and knowledge base.
hub.faq2Q: Can we mix crawled website text with uploaded PDFs?
hub.faq2A: Absolutely. Map visitor questions to crawl targets, files, structured lists, or APIs — and change mappings when you update content.
hub.faq3Q: Is it suitable for GDPR-focused teams?
hub.faq3A: Synaplan is designed with EU deployment in mind: data residency options, retention controls, and detailed logs. Your legal review still applies to your use case.
hub.faq4A: Open the docs for the embed snippet and WordPress plugin, or book a demo for a walkthrough with your IT and marketing stakeholders.
hub.bottomCtaTitle: Ready to try it on your site?
hub.bottomCtaLead: Start free, or book a short demo to align security and branding.
hub.landingStatsSubtitle: Aligned with our technical SEO goals: responsive UI, minimal layout shift, and EU-friendly data handling.
hub.stat1Desc: Lean widget bundle and static-first pages help keep Largest Contentful Paint in a healthy range.
hub.stat2Desc: We keep client JS small so taps and scrolls stay snappy — good for INP-style responsiveness.
hub.stat3Desc: Retention rules, hosting options, and audit trails — what procurement asks about before sign-off.
hub.step1Desc: Crawl pages, upload PDFs, or paste structured FAQs — same knowledge your team trusts.
hub.step2Desc: Route visitor questions to the right source (like the flow demo on our homepage).
hub.step3Desc: Match your brand, drop in the snippet or WordPress plugin, publish.
hub.step4Desc: Watch conversations, adjust mappings, scale models when you are ready.
hub.painSectionTitle: What we hear from marketing teams
hub.pain1Desc: Visitors get wrong numbers — Synaplan grounds answers in your crawled pages and uploaded files.
hub.pain2Desc: The widget uses your Synaplan workspace: one routing and cost view, not a separate bot stack.
hub.pain3Desc: EU hosting, retention, and logs are built for the conversations legal and IT actually have.
hub.benefitSectionTitle: Why teams pick Synaplan for the website
hub.benefit1Desc: No split between “website AI” and “serious AI” — one policy surface for your org.
hub.benefit2Desc: Serve visitors in their language while staying tied to your approved source text.
hub.benefit3Desc: No black box — your security team can review what ships. Self-host when required.
hub.pricingHighlight: Plans from €19.95/mo for website widgets — scale when traffic grows.
hub.demoCaption: Interactive preview — scripted demo, not live data.
hub.midCtaLead: Start free or book a demo — we cover embed, your knowledge sources, and settings for your website widget.

trades.metaTitle: Chat widget for trades & crafts — Synaplan
trades.metaDescription: Answer appointment, pricing, and emergency questions on your craft business website with a Synaplan chat widget grounded in your real pages and PDFs.
trades.heroTitle: Less phone tag, more time on the job
trades.heroLead: Master workshops and regional service teams use the Synaplan widget to handle repeat questions — opening hours, service areas, quote requests, and PDF spec sheets — without maintaining a separate FAQ bot.
trades.section1Body: When can you come out? Do you stock this part? Where is your emergency number? What’s in the warranty PDF? Map each intent to a crawl path, an uploaded document, or a short structured list so answers stay short and factual.
trades.section2Body: Even when the office is closed, visitors get orientation from your published hours and on-call policy. Escalations still go to your team — the widget reduces noise, not accountability.
trades.section3Body: Use this URL when you want a concise story: headline, live demo, and dual CTAs so visitors grasp Synaplan at a glance without hunting through a generic homepage.
trades.landingCtaHint: Helpful context for visitors who care about “emergency plumber chatbot”, “craft business AI”, or local service topics — Synaplan explained in one place.
trades.demoCaption: Industry demo — scripted messages for trades.
trades.pain1Desc: Repeat questions about coverage and hours burn capacity — automate the first response with grounded answers.
trades.pain2Desc: Specs live in handbooks — the widget surfaces the right paragraph instead of “see our website”.
trades.pain3Desc: Publish what you can promise; the widget reflects your on-call rules without overpromising.
trades.benefitSectionTitle: What the widget does for your shop
trades.benefit1Desc: Visitors self-serve on standard questions; your team handles exceptions.
trades.benefit2Title: Parts and pricing stay tied to source
trades.benefit2Desc: Mappings to crawl targets and PDFs reduce “creative” answers on money topics.
trades.benefit3Desc: Change copy and mappings in Synaplan — no redeploy of a separate bot platform.
trades.bottomCtaLead: Start free, connect your pages, then book a demo to align dispatch and marketing.

hospitality.metaTitle: Chat widget for hotels & hospitality — Synaplan
hospitality.metaDescription: Reduce front-desk load with a Synaplan chat widget: check-in, parking, breakfast, and local tips from your official content — multilingual and on-brand.
hospitality.heroLead: Hotels and hosts publish the same facts in many places. The widget pulls from your chosen pages and lists so “breakfast time” and “pet policy” don’t drift between the website, OTA copy, and reception scripts.
hospitality.section1Body: Point visitor questions at your rates and policy pages, PDF brochures, and a curated FAQ list for things that change seasonally. For member or loyalty data, use Pro connectors with your CRM rules.
hospitality.section2Body: Align the widget with your brand voice in Synaplan and serve international guests with multilingual models — still grounded in your approved text.
hospitality.section3Title: Built for guest intents and discovery
hospitality.section3Body: The copy aligns with amenity and destination questions guests actually ask; structured data and FAQ-style content support visibility in search results.
hospitality.landingCtaHint: Aligns with topics like “hotel chatbot”, guest messaging, or destination and amenity questions — Synaplan in one clear view.
hospitality.pain1Desc: OTA, email, phone — align answers from one curated knowledge base in Synaplan.
hospitality.pain2Desc: Breakfast hours and pet rules change — update lists and crawls; the widget follows.
hospitality.pain3Desc: Night staff shouldn’t translate policies from scratch — models respond in guest language from approved text.
hospitality.benefit1Desc: Guests resolve routine questions before they stand in line.
hospitality.benefit2Desc: Tone and facts come from your Synaplan configuration, not random web text.
hospitality.benefit3Desc: Link from your site so guests see the story and demo in one flow.
hospitality.bottomCtaTitle: Add hospitality AI to your site
hospitality.bottomCtaLead: Try Synaplan free, connect your official pages, then scale with Pro connectors when needed.

customers.metaDescription: How yoga studios, care providers, public-sector cloud, and product teams use Synaplan — including the website chat widget and secure AI workflows.
customers.heroTitle: Deployed by teams who need clarity and control
customers.heroLead: Below are representative ways customers use Synaplan. Quotes are from our public materials; deployments vary by plan and configuration.
customers.introP1: Across industries, the same pattern appears: connect approved knowledge, route models centrally, and give visitors self-service without shadow IT.
customers.introP2: Use these stories to benchmark your rollout — from SMB websites to regulated environments.
customers.megaherzSiteAlt: Megaherz Yoga website homepage with hero and navigation
customers.megaherzWidgetAlt: Synaplan chat widget open on megaherz-yoga.com
customers.story1Quote: More time for mindfulness and less effort for organization.
customers.story1Body: The studio uses Synaplan to answer recurring questions about schedules and studio rules, so teachers stay present with participants instead of inbox triage.
customers.story2Body: Frequent questions route through structured answers where appropriate, easing pressure on nursing staff while keeping escalation paths clear.
customers.story3Quote: Authorities use Synaplan to securely process sensitive data.
customers.story3Body: A GDPR-aware layer over external AI services helps teams meet compliance expectations while adopting modern tools.
customers.story4Quote: Straightforward AI use for support and internal processes.
customers.story4Body: SMB-friendly rollout: website and internal workflows share governance without a heavy IT project.

hub.placeholder: Ask about hours, files, or policies…
hub.bot0: Hi! I can answer from your website, PDFs, and FAQ lists — same policies as your Synaplan workspace.
hub.user0: What are your support hours this week?
hub.bot1: Monday–Friday 9:00–18:00 CET, Saturday 10:00–14:00 — taken from your /hours crawl.
hub.user1: Do you have a product PDF I can download?
hub.bot2: Yes — handbook.pdf is indexed; I can summarize warranty and safety sections on request.
hub.user2: We need GDPR-friendly hosting — what options exist?
hub.bot3: Synaplan supports EU hosting, retention rules for uploads, and detailed logs for audits. Self-host if your policy requires it.
hub.user3: Book a 15-minute setup call for our marketing team.

trades.placeholder: Ask about appointments, parts, or emergencies…
trades.bot0: Hello — I answer from your service pages, price lists, and on-call policy. How can I help?
trades.user0: Can you come out tomorrow morning for a leak?
trades.bot1: Emergency slots: Mon–Sat 7:00–20:00 per your published schedule — I can offer the next window or escalate.
trades.user1: Do you stock gasket size XY for model Z?
trades.bot2: According to your parts PDF: available for pickup; delivery in 24–48h within your service radius.
trades.user2: What does a standard visit cost?
trades.bot3: Starter call-out €89 + materials — details match your /pricing page; I never invent numbers outside it.
trades.user3: Send me the warranty PDF link.

hospitality.bot0: Welcome — I answer from your official hotel pages and seasonal notes. What do you need?
hospitality.user0: What time is breakfast and where is parking?
hospitality.bot1: Breakfast 6:30–10:30 in the garden restaurant; parking P1 included for guests — from your amenities page.
hospitality.user1: Are pets allowed in the deluxe rooms?
hospitality.bot2: Pets allowed in selected deluxe rooms with a €25 nightly fee — policy text from your FAQ list.
hospitality.user2: Can I get a late checkout Sunday?
hospitality.bot3: Late checkout until 14:00 subject to availability — I can outline the fee from your rate sheet.
hospitality.user3: Book a table at the restaurant for two tonight.

privacyPolicy.metaDescription: Information on the processing of your personal data on synaplan.com in accordance with GDPR.
privacyPolicy.pageSubtitle: Transparent information on the processing of your personal data on synaplan.com.
privacyPolicy.s1Body: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
privacyPolicy.s2Body: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously and treat it in accordance with applicable data protection laws and this privacy policy. In general, you can use our website without providing personal data. Where personal data is collected on our pages, this is always on a voluntary basis. This data will not be passed on to third parties without your explicit consent. We draw your attention to the fact that data transmission over the internet may have security gaps. Complete protection against access by third parties is not possible.
privacyPolicy.s3CookiesBody: Our website uses cookies. Cookies are small text files stored on your device. You can manage cookies via your browser settings or our cookie banner at any time and enable or disable individual categories.
privacyPolicy.s3NecessaryBody: These cookies are required for the basic functions of the website (session management, security, language settings). Without these cookies the website cannot function properly.
privacyPolicy.s3AnalyticsBody: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting and reporting information anonymously, allowing us to continuously improve the user experience.
privacyPolicy.s3MarketingBody: These cookies are used to offer visitors relevant content and marketing campaigns. They track visitors across websites and collect information to provide tailored content.
privacyPolicy.s3LogsBody: The website provider automatically collects and stores information in server log files that your browser transmits to us. This includes: IP address, date and time of the request, page accessed, access status/HTTP status code, data volume transferred, referring website, browser and operating system.
privacyPolicy.s4Body: Our website offers you the option to book a demo appointment via the Calendly service. When you use the booking feature, your details (name, email address, any additional information you provide and the chosen time slot) are transferred to Calendly and processed there. Data is only transferred to Calendly once you actively complete and submit the booking form.
privacyPolicy.s4Provider: Calendly, LLC, 271 17th St NW, Ste 1000, Atlanta, GA 30363, USA
privacyPolicy.s4Legal: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent through active use of the booking form)
privacyPolicy.s4Transfer: Calendly processes data on servers in the USA. Calendly is certified under the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (DPF).
privacyPolicy.s5Body: This website is hosted on servers operated by Hetzner Online GmbH. The hoster processes data collected during your visit to the website on our behalf.
privacyPolicy.s5Provider: Hetzner Online GmbH, Industriestr. 25, 91710 Gunzenhausen, Germany
privacyPolicy.s5Data: IP address, access time, pages accessed, referrer, browser information
privacyPolicy.s5Legal: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in reliable hosting)
privacyPolicy.s5Dpa: Data processing agreement pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR in place
privacyPolicy.s6Body: We use Cloudflare's Content Delivery Network (CDN) to enhance the security and delivery speed of our website. A CDN is a network of globally distributed servers that delivers content to users in an optimised manner.
privacyPolicy.s6Provider: Cloudflare Germany GmbH, Rosental 7, 80331 Munich, Germany
privacyPolicy.s6Data: IP address, timestamps, HTTP requests, browser information
privacyPolicy.s6Purpose: Faster load times, DDoS protection, SSL certificate provision, rate-limiting and abuse detection
privacyPolicy.s6Dpa: Data processing agreement pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR
privacyPolicy.s6Transfer: Cloudflare also processes data on servers in the USA. The transfer is based on the EU Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses and the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (DPF).
privacyPolicy.s7Body: This website uses Cloudflare Zaraz, a server-side tag management system running on Cloudflare's edge infrastructure. Analytics scripts are not loaded directly in your browser but processed server-side, preventing direct contact between your browser and third-party servers. This provides enhanced privacy and improved website performance.
privacyPolicy.s7Measures: Active privacy measures: IP addresses are truncated before transmission (IP anonymisation). User-agent strings are sanitised. Processing takes place on Cloudflare's EU servers. Google Consent Mode v2 is enabled — personal data is only processed after you have given your explicit consent.
privacyPolicy.s7Legal: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent). You can withdraw your consent at any time in the cookie settings. Without consent, no analytics data is collected.
privacyPolicy.s7Transfer: Server-side processing via Cloudflare Zaraz prevents the direct transfer of data from your browser to US servers.
privacyPolicy.s8Body: We store personal data only for as long as necessary for the respective purpose or as required by statutory retention obligations. After the retention period expires, your data is automatically deleted unless statutory retention obligations (e.g. tax retention periods of 6 or 10 years) apply.
privacyPolicy.s9Title: 9. Your rights as a data subject
privacyPolicy.s9Body: Under GDPR you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacyPolicy.s9R1b: You can request information about the personal data we process about you.
privacyPolicy.s9R2b: You can request the correction of inaccurate data or the completion of incomplete data.
privacyPolicy.s9R3b: You can request the deletion of your personal data where the legal requirements are met.
privacyPolicy.s9R4: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
privacyPolicy.s9R4b: You can request the restriction of the processing of your data.
privacyPolicy.s9R5b: You can receive your data in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format.
privacyPolicy.s9R6b: You can object to the processing of your data based on your particular situation at any time.
privacyPolicy.s9R7b: You can withdraw consent you have given at any time with effect for the future.
privacyPolicy.s9R8: Right to lodge a complaint (Art. 77 GDPR)
privacyPolicy.s9R8b: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
privacyPolicy.s9Contact: To exercise your rights, please contact:
privacyPolicy.s10Body: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content, this site uses SSL or TLS encryption. You can recognise an encrypted connection by the fact that the address line of the browser changes from 'http://' to 'https://' and by the lock icon in the browser bar. When SSL or TLS encryption is active, the data you transmit to us cannot be read by third parties.
privacyPolicy.s11Body: We hereby object to the use of contact data published as part of our imprint obligation for the purpose of sending unsolicited advertising and informational materials. The site operators expressly reserve the right to take legal action in the event of the unsolicited sending of advertising information, such as spam emails.

imprint.metaDescription: Legal information and contact details for metadist data management GmbH, operator of synaplan.com.
imprint.disclaimerBody: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
imprint.copyrightBody: The contents and works created on these pages by the site operators are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, adaptation, distribution and any form of utilisation outside the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author.

companiesPage.metaTitle: Synaplan for Companies — AI under control
companiesPage.metaDescription: All AI models your team needs in one GDPR-compliant platform. RAG knowledge base, audit logs, cost controls, and a chat widget — without extra IT overhead.
companiesPage.heroTitle: All the AI your team needs — one platform, full control
companiesPage.heroLead: Synaplan puts every AI model your business uses under one roof: audit trails, cost limits, GDPR-compliant EU hosting, and a knowledge base that answers from your own documents.
companiesPage.featuresTitle: Everything your team needs — nothing your compliance team hates
companiesPage.f1Desc: GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and local Ollama models — routed automatically by cost, latency, and your own policies. No separate accounts, no copy-paste between tools.
companiesPage.f2Desc: Upload manuals, pricing sheets, policies, and FAQs. The AI answers from your documents — not from the internet. Semantic search keeps results accurate and on-brand.
companiesPage.f3Desc: Every query is logged with model, cost, and user. Set roles and usage limits per department. Full data sovereignty for regulated industries — self-host when needed.
companiesPage.f4Desc: Hosting in Europe with clear data separation. Your data never trains external models. Deploy on your own servers for complete data sovereignty.
companiesPage.f5Desc: Set monthly budgets per team, model, or use case. Routing automatically picks the cheapest model that meets your quality requirements — no surprise bills.
companiesPage.f6Desc: Give visitors instant answers from the same knowledge base your team uses. Embed on any website in minutes — no separate bot platform required.
companiesPage.ctaBannerTitle: Ready to put your AI workflows in order?
companiesPage.ctaBannerBody: Start free and connect your first knowledge source today. Upgrade when your team needs more.

developersPage.metaTitle: Synaplan for Developers — open AI infrastructure
developersPage.metaDescription: Fully open-source AI platform. Self-host with Docker, connect via REST API, build custom plugins, and use Synaplan as the AI backbone for your own product.
developersPage.heroLead: Synaplan is fully open-source. Self-host it, connect via REST API, build custom plugins, or use it as the AI backbone for your own product — Apache 2.0, no lock-in.
developersPage.f1Desc: Fork, inspect, and contribute. Apache 2.0 licence — no lock-in, no black box. The full stack (PHP backend, Vue.js frontend, MariaDB, Qdrant) is on GitHub.
developersPage.f2Desc: Every function exposed as an API endpoint. Build your own UI, automate workflows, or integrate Synaplan into existing tools — documented at docs.synaplan.com.
developersPage.f3Desc: Extend Synaplan with purpose-built plugins for Nextcloud, OpenCloud, WordPress, marketing, and more. Or publish your own under the metadist organisation.
developersPage.f4Desc: Deploy in minutes with docker compose. Full stack ready out of the box — including local AI inference via Ollama so your data never leaves your infrastructure.
developersPage.f5Desc: Route by cost, latency, or policy. Swap models without touching your integration code — GPT, Claude, Gemini, and any local model work interchangeably.
developersPage.f6Desc: Qdrant and MariaDB VECTOR for semantic RAG — no external embedding service required. Fine-tune retrieval per knowledge source and use case.
developersPage.pluginsCtaBody: Marketing, Nextcloud, WordPress, file management — and more on the way. All plugins are open-source and follow the same architecture.

pluginsPage.metaTitle: Synaplan Plugins — AI extensions for your workflows
pluginsPage.metaDescription: Extend Synaplan with purpose-built plugins: marketing campaigns, Nextcloud & OpenCloud AI, WordPress support chat, and more. Open source, built for your industry.
pluginsPage.heroLead: Plugins are open-source extensions that bring Synaplan's AI capabilities directly into the tools and processes your team already uses — from file management to marketing to your own cloud platform.
pluginsPage.sectionWhatBody: Each plugin connects Synaplan's AI core to a specific tool or use case. They are maintained as separate open-source repositories under the metadist organisation so your team can audit, fork, and adapt them. All plugins share the same model routing, RAG pipeline, and GDPR-friendly architecture as the core platform.
pluginsPage.plugin1Desc: Create and manage AI-powered marketing campaigns and materials. Includes Google Ads integration, copy generation, and campaign planning — all grounded in your knowledge base.
pluginsPage.plugin2Desc: Bring Synaplan directly into Nextcloud: RAG-powered document discussions, AI translations, and automatic summarisations without leaving your own cloud.
pluginsPage.plugin3Desc: Native AI integration for OpenCloud — the open-source alternative to Microsoft 365. Discuss files, generate summaries, and search your documents with semantic RAG.
pluginsPage.plugin4Desc: Embed a Synaplan-powered support chat with RAG on any WordPress site. Free starter kit — your own knowledge base, no external bot platform required.
pluginsPage.plugin5Desc: AI-assisted file organisation and management. SortX analyses, categorises, and structures documents across your storage so your team always finds what they need.
pluginsPage.plugin6Desc: User profiling and persistent memory across sessions. Synaplan remembers relevant context per user and uses it to personalise answers — powered by Qdrant vector search.
pluginsPage.sectionCtaBody: All plugins follow the same open architecture. Fork any existing plugin or start from scratch — the Synaplan API and documentation are publicly available.
pluginsPage.commissionTitle: Need a custom plugin for your company?
pluginsPage.commissionBody: We build purpose-built plugins that connect Synaplan's AI to your existing tools, processes, and data sources — fully open-source and tailored to your industry.
pluginsPage.commissionFeature1: Custom integrations for your existing tools
pluginsPage.commissionFeature2: Delivered as open-source, you own the code
pluginsPage.commissionFeature3: Built by the team behind Synaplan
